item.title: All-Port TLS Inspection: SonicWall RFDPI and DPI-SSL Explained
item.description: Over 90% of traffic is encrypted. Threats run on port 4444, 8443, or wherever they choose. See how SonicWall RFDPI and DPI-SSL inspect every port, every session.

item.title: Microsoft Security Bulletin Coverage for May 2026
Recognizing Outstanding Performance in 2022 | SonicWall
item.description: Announcing the 2023 SonicWall Partner Awards for outstanding performance by SonicWall distributors and partners globally.

item.title: New “Reward for Value” for Channel Partners | SonicWall Blog
item.description: Learn more about the “Reward for Value” program as well as SonicWall's other partnering engines like Incentives, Enablement, Support and Services.

item.title: SonicWall Takes Firewalls, SonicOS and Cloud Analytics to Elite Levels
item.description: SonicWall Cloud Analytics provides extensive drill-down investigative and forensic capabilities for deep security data analysis.

item.title: Upgrade Your SonicWall Next-Generation Firewall with ‘3 & Free’ Program
Black Hat USA 2017: Build Your Arsenal with SonicWall Capture
item.description: At Black Hat USA 2017, SonicWall's team of experts will be in booth 554 July 26-27 to demonstrate deployment of Capture using real malware samples.

item.title: SonicWall Unveils Boundless 2020, Company’s Largest Ever Global Virtual Experience
SonicWall MSSP Program: Filling the Cyber Security Skills Gap
item.description: Recognizing that time to revenue is critical, our MSSP program offers MSS blueprints to help Partners jumpstart their managed security service offerings quickly and cost effectively.

item.title: New SonicWall SecureFirst Partner Program | SonicWall Blog
item.description: Learn more about SonicWall's new SecureFirst Partner Program, an all-around network security solution for our valued channel partners.

item.title: SonicWall CEO Bill Conner Joins Cyber Security Panel on Capitol Hill
item.description: On March 6, cyber security experts and policymakers will come together in a panel discussion featuring Congressman Lamar Smith, SonicWall CEO Bill Conner and the Honorable Secretary Michael Chertoff, to address the current threat landscape and its impact on the U.S. economy.

item.title: A New Era of Partnering to Win
item.description: SonicWall Partners are at the core of our success. We're continually improving products, services, support, and brand awareness.

item.title: SonicWall and our Channel Partners Team to Deliver Security Services
item.description: The program identifies and showcases SonicWall SecureFirst channel partners who have a security focused professional services practice.

item.title: Sneak Peak: 2018 SonicWall Cyber Threat Report | SonicWall Blog
item.description: The cyber security industry relies on perpetual cadence of collaboration, research, analysis and review. For SonicWall, that comes via our in-depth cyber threat report. This year, we’re excited to announce that we will publish the 2018 SonicWall Cyber Threat Report on Tuesday, March 6.

item.title: Cybersecurity for SMBs: Bundled Network Security Delivers Cost-Effective Protection
item.description: SMB cyber security available in cost-effective bundles. Tailored for growing businesses and small offices.

item.title: ‘3 & Free’ Promotion: The Easiest Way to Upgrade Your SonicWall Firewall for Free
‘3 & Free’ Promotion: The Easiest Way to Upgrade Your SonicWall Firewall for Free
SonicWall Network Security Administrator Course | SonicWall Blog
item.description: Based on student feedback and market requirements, SonicWall’s Education Services Organization is introducing the SonicWall Network Security Administrator (SNSA) course; a completely new training course and certification exam that will replace the Network Security Basic Administration (NSBA) class.

item.title: CEO Bill Conner Wins SC Media 2017 Reboot Leadership Award
item.description: Bill Conner is the recipient of the inaugural SC Media Reboot Leadership Award. He is one of only six honored in the publication’s top management category.

item.title: Channel Partner Award Winners at EMEA PEAK16 | SonicWall Blog
item.description: At EMEA PEAK16, SonicWall announced channel partner award winners and new investments to further align with customer needs and partner engagement models.

item.title: Switch to SonicWall: 8 Reasons to Trade In Your Old Firewall
Passate a SonicWall: 8 motivi per permutare i vecchi firewall
SonicWall Wraps a Winning Streak in the Cyber Arms Race at RSA 2017
item.description: All of the innovation to get ahead of the cyber arms race SonicWall is delivering to the marketplace has resulted in four awards.

item.title: EMEA Peak16: Come for Knowledge and Leave with Power | SonicWall Blog
item.description: SonicWAll Security EMEA Peak16 details for our partners how to architect and deliver the security solutions that turn "non" into "yes".

item.title: SonicWall Simplifies Day-to-Day Operations for MSSPs
item.description: MSSP operations, security and customer management streamlined by SonicWall.

item.title: Advanced Security Training: New SonicWall Network Security Professional (SNSP) Course & Certification
How to Use Threat Intelligence to Stop Cyber Attacks | SonicWall Blog
item.description: Within the SonicWall Security Center, the highly interactive threat meters provide real-time threat intelligence about today’s most critical attack trends.

item.title: Focused Cybersecurity Education with SonicWall University
item.description: Because our goal is to outwit highly knowledgeable criminals, one of our greatest assets in this ongoing battle is cybersecurity education.

item.title: Security as a Story: Using Reporting to Prove Your Value as an MSP
item.description: Learn how reporting can help you tell your MSP story effectively so your customers experience your true value.

item.title: What Is a Virtual Firewall? Cloud & VM Security Explained
item.description: Learn how virtual firewalls secure east-west traffic across VMware, AWS, Azure, and Kubernetes—where traditional edge firewalls fall short.

item.title: Why Multi-Engine Cloud AV Is the Only Reliable Defense Against Modern Malware | SonicWall
item.description: Single antivirus engines miss 2-15% of novel malware. Learn how SonicWall’s multi-engine cloud AV architecture (Gateway AV, Capture ATP, Capture Client, and MDR) delivers layered protection across gateway, sandbox, and endpoint.

item.title: A Long Time Ago in a Galaxy Far, Far Away…Cybersecurity Was Already Hard
SonicWall Gen 6 End of Life: The Credential Visibility Gap Putting Your Network at Risk
item.description: 1 in 10 SonicWall devices running Credential Auditor found bad credentials — and Gen 6 firewalls can’t run it. Learn why upgrading to Gen 7 is a critical security decision, not just a hardware refresh.

item.title: Partner Power News - May 2026: Protection. Transition. Scale. | SonicWall
item.description: Turn insight into action with Partner Power News May 2026. Cyber Protect insights, product transitions, EPSS on Gen 7 TZ, SaaS milestones, and new enablement resources to scale impact and pipeline.

item.title: Virtual Firewall vs. Physical Firewall: How to Choose the Right Protection for Cloud, On-Premises, and Hybrid Networks
item.description: Virtual firewalls deliver cloud agility. Physical firewalls deliver throughput and control. Learn the differences, use cases, and how to deploy both together.

item.title: How SonicWall's Hybrid Mesh Firewall Aligns with Gartner's CSMA Framework
item.description: Discover how SonicWall Unified Management enables a Hybrid Mesh Firewall architecture that maps directly to Gartner's Cybersecurity Mesh Architecture principles for distributed, cloud-ready security.

item.title: Mesop AI Sandbox Unauthenticated RCE - CVE-2026-33057
item.description: Critical CVSS 9.8 unauthenticated RCE in Google Mesop AI Sandbox /exec-py endpoint allows arbitrary Python execution. SonicWall IPS signature available.

item.title: The Death of the Firewall — Why It Isn't Going Anywhere | SonicWall
item.description: The firewall has been declared dead for decades. So why is the market still growing? SonicWall CPO Chandrodaya Prasad explains why it is not going anywhere.

item.title: The Ransomware Chimera That Does Everything
item.description: This week, the SonicWall Capture Labs Threat Research team examined a .NET executable that combines ransomware, botnet, information stealer, and worm capabilities. The sample is particularly notable for explicitly referencing eight different ransomware families throughout its codebase.

item.title: The Ransomware Chimera That Does Everything
item.description: This week, the SonicWall Capture Labs Threat Research team examined a .NET executable that combines ransomware, botnet, information stealer, and worm capabilities. The sample is particularly notable for explicitly referencing eight different ransomware families throughout its codebase.

item.title: 8 Key Features of Virtual Firewalls: What You Need to Know
item.description: Discover the 8 essential features of virtual firewalls, from policy-based filtering and DNS security to malware protection and seamless cloud integration. Learn how these capabilities protect modern hybrid and cloud environments.

item.title: Why Virtual Firewalls Are Now Essential: Key Trends Driving Adoption
item.description: Cloud migration, hybrid work, Zero Trust, and AI-driven threats are forcing IT teams to rethink network security. Here are the key trends making virtual firewalls indispensable — and what IT admins need to know now.

item.title: SFP, SFP+, SFP28, QSFP+, QSFP28: Choosing the Right Transceiver for Your SonicWall Deployment
item.description: Learn how SFP, SFP+, SFP28, QSFP+, and QSFP28 transceivers work, when to use each module, and how to validate compatibility across SonicWall firewall and switch platforms.

item.title: DS-Lite, v6plus, DHCPv6 Prefix Delegation: SonicOS 8 IPv6 Transition Mechanisms Explained
item.description: Learn how SonicOS 8 supports DS-Lite, v6plus Static IP Address Service, DHCPv6 Prefix Delegation, and configurable Interface Identifiers for IPv6-primary ISP networks without additional CPE hardware.

item.title: Adversary in the Middle Attacks - Abusing Trust via Weaponized PDFs
Next.js WebSocket Upgrade Handler SSRF - CVE-2026-44578
item.description: High-severity CVSS 8.6 SSRF in self-hosted Next.js servers via crafted WebSocket upgrade requests. SonicWall IPS signatures available.

item.title: Extend Firewall Security to Remote Workers with SonicWall CSE
item.description: Discover how SonicWall CSE delivers enterprise-grade network protection to remote and hybrid workers, including content filtering, malicious domain blocking, and sandbox analysis.

item.title: Indicator of Compromise IP Protection in SonicOS 8: How It Works and Why It Matters
item.description: Learn how Indicator of Compromise (IoC) IP Protection in SonicOS 8 automatically blocks malicious IP connections in real time, stopping malware command-and-control before attackers can act. No manual rules. Hourly updates.

item.title: H2O-3 PostgreSQL JDBC socketFactory RCE - CVE-2026-3960
item.description: Critical CVSS 9.8 unauthenticated RCE in H2O-3 ImportSQLTable abuses PostgreSQL JDBC socketFactory and Spring gadget. SonicWall IPS signature available.

item.title: 8 Key Benefits of Virtual Firewalls for Cloud and Hybrid Environments
item.description: Discover the 8 core benefits of virtual firewalls, from east-west traffic inspection to cloud compatibility. Learn how SonicWall virtual firewalls secure modern distributed and multi-cloud environments.
